hero.title: Find your experiences
hero.lead: Choose your days on the island, build one trip from many excursions, and pay once.

list.title: Curated experiences
list.lead: Coastal excursions book instantly. Safaris and tailor-made routes are arranged on request.
list.empty: No experiences match your search yet — try a different word.

section.title: Choose your departure
section.lead: Pick a date, time and guests — add it to one trip with your other experiences and pay once at checkout.
section.point_cart: Combine several experiences in one order
section.point_codes: A separate booking code for every trip

panel.pick_date_hint: Select a date above to see available departures.
panel.not_charged: You won't be charged yet — review everything at checkout.

cart.title: Your trip
cart.note: Each experience keeps its own date, time and guests.
cart.request_note: Your trip has request items, so we confirm availability first — you pay once at the end.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.sub_one: One order, {{count}} experience · Destination Paradise is your single host.
checkout.sub_few: One order, {{count}} experiences · Destination Paradise is your single host.
checkout.sub_many: One order, {{count}} experiences · Destination Paradise is your single host.
checkout.sub_other: One order, {{count}} experiences · Destination Paradise is your single host.
checkout.payment_note: You'll complete your payment on the secure page of our payment partner DPO Pay. In this preview the payment is simulated — no card details are entered on this site and nothing is charged.
checkout.recheck_note: Availability is re-checked before you pay.
checkout.conflict: Some departures are no longer available. Please adjust the highlighted trips.
checkout.failed: We couldn't complete the payment just now. Nothing was charged — please try again in a moment.
checkout.payment_unavailable: Online payment isn't available yet — your selection was saved as an order, but no payment was taken. Please use the booking request form for now.
checkout.usd_note: You'll be charged in US dollars — prices shown in other currencies are estimates.

errors.name_required: Please add the lead guest's name.
errors.email_invalid: That email address doesn't look right.

checkout.request_sub: No payment now — we confirm availability first, then you approve one final price.
checkout.request_note: We check every requested experience with our local partners and email you a confirmed plan with the final price, usually within 24 hours. Your places are held and paid only after you approve it.
checkout.request_footnote: Nothing is charged or held when you send a request.
checkout.request_pricing_hint: Requested experiences are priced in your confirmation email.

confirm.processing_text: We're confirming order <ref>{{reference}}</ref> with our payment partner. This usually takes a few seconds — this page updates by itself.
confirm.problem_text: Order <ref>{{reference}}</ref> wasn't charged, or the payment needs a manual check. If money left your account we'll resolve it by email — otherwise you can simply try again.
confirm.title: Your next trip to Paradise
confirm.lead: Order <ref>{{reference}}</ref> is confirmed. A confirmation is on its way to your email — each experience has its own booking code below.
confirm.missing_text: This confirmation link has expired in this browser. Your email confirmation has all the details.
confirm.request_lead: Request <ref>{{reference}}</ref> is with our team. We're checking availability with our local partners and will email your confirmed plan and final price, usually within 24 hours.
confirm.request_footnote: Nothing is charged or held yet. You can close this page — everything continues by email.
confirm.quote_lead: Everything in request <ref>{{reference}}</ref> is confirmed by our partners. Review the plan and accept to hold your places and continue to payment.
confirm.accept_note: Accepting re-checks availability and holds every place in your trip; payment follows as one combined amount.
confirm.accept_conflict: One of the departures just sold out. Our team has been notified and will email you an alternative.
confirm.accepted_payment_pending: Your places are held! Online payment opens shortly — we will email you the payment link.

request_panel.lead: Tell us your preferred dates — we confirm availability and the final price by email, usually within 24 hours. Nothing is charged or held yet.
request_panel.foot: Joins your trip as a request — you'll approve the final price before any payment.

request_section.title: Tell us your dates
request_section.lead: This experience is arranged with our local partners, so we confirm availability before anything is booked or paid.
request_section.point_no_charge: No charge and no holds until you approve
request_section.point_confirm: We confirm dates and the final price within about 24 hours
request_section.point_one_payment: Everything ends in one combined payment
request_section.pickup_fallback: Pickup details are confirmed together with your dates.
